summary: Comprehensive frontend testing of 3D Globe enhancements on /service-areas page. All 16 requested features verified working correctly: polygon-based country highlighting (purple tones), UFO animation (Jetsons-style with trail), Rocket launch from Houston TX, hover tooltip via globe.gl polygonLabel, click popup with service details, two service groups (Square POS vs Clover), legend with 4 categories, country tags for all 10 countries, electric arc connections, and all page sections intact.

passed: 1. Globe container renders with correct height (540px min-height)
2. WebGL canvas present inside globe container (globe.gl initialized)
3. Countries highlighted in purple polygon tones on globe
4. UFO animation CSS keyframes (ufoPath, ufoGlow) present and visible
5. Rocket animation CSS keyframes (rocketLaunch, exhaustFlicker) present and visible
6. UFO visible flying across globe with purple trail
7. Rocket visible launching from Houston TX area with exhaust flame
8. Legend shows 4 categories: Square + Clover, Square POS, Clover/Exatouch, Service Connections
9. Country tags show all 10 countries: US, Canada, UK, Japan, Australia, Spain, France, Ireland, Puerto Rico, USVI
10. Click popup works - US shows both Square POS & Clover services correctly
12. Electric arc connections visible between Houston and international countries
13. Globe tooltip style override (.scene-tooltip) present for custom hover styling
14. All page sections render: Hero, Coverage, Globe, Merchant Accounts, Free POS, Installation, Industries, Why MSC, FAQ, CTA
16. Form modal opens and closes correctly from CTA buttons
17. Breadcrumb navigation renders correctly (Home > Company > Service Areas)
18. No console errors on page load

critical_code_review_comments: ServiceAreas.jsx well-structured with globe.gl integration using polygonsData, arcsData, and ringsData
COUNTRY_ISO correctly maps ISO 3166-1 numeric codes to countries with appropriate service groups
US/Canada correctly have both ['square', 'clover'] groups; UK/Japan/Australia/Spain/France/Ireland have only ['square']
Puerto Rico/USVI correctly have only ['clover'] group
UfoAnimation and RocketAnimation components use CSS keyframes for performance
Globe tooltip HTML (polygonLabel) properly returns styled HTML with service details
Click popup (selectedRegion state) correctly displays country name and services with close button
seed_data_creation: N/A - Static page with no database operations
context_for_next_testing_agent: Service Areas page 3D Globe enhancements complete. Globe uses globe.gl library with: polygonsData (GeoJSON countries), arcsData (electric connections from Houston), ringsData (pulsing effects). UFO/Rocket are CSS keyframe animations in overlay divs with z-index:5. 10 countries configured: US/Canada (both services), UK/Japan/Australia/Spain/France/Ireland (Square only), Puerto Rico/USVI (Clover only). Click popup works via onPolygonClick -> setSelectedRegion state. Hover tooltip via polygonLabel returning HTML.
